title: Upgrade three primary health centres in the constituency
description: Promised an upgrade of three identified primary health centres to 24x7 facilities by 2026.

title: Add 50 new electric buses on local routes
description: Pledge to add 50 e-buses to existing local route network within the term.

title: Free wi-fi at every government school
description: Promise to install free, supervised wi-fi at all government schools in the constituency.

title: Air quality monitoring at every ward
description: Install ward-level PM2.5 monitors with public dashboards.
